title: calathea orbifolia
intro: Calathea orbifolia, also known as the Peacock Plant or Prayer Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant is valued for its ornamental foliage, featuring large, rounded leaves with unique patterns, and its ability to thrive in low-light conditions. The Calathea orbifolia has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and is often prepared as a tea to aid in digestion and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and steeped in hot water to make a tea, which is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation.
